elements.name: B-474831 FXL-FFD-CIL-MH_Inventory Control-Base Transactions# 4- Consume iLPN having no lock
elements.description:
Creating ASN through Post Message UI and complete receiving bypasing through staging location & 
validating iLPN have no lock & consume the iLPN using RF Menu. Also validate PIX transaction

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user update "Single Line PO" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "856" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user opens RF menu and completes "MM3 Rec-CASE-Ptwy" operation in Misc menu
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
user opens RF menu and completes "MM3 Consume iLPN" operation in Misc menu
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the iLPN status
validates the PIX Transactions "300" for consuming iLPN
user log out from application

elements.name: B-474831 FXL-FFD-CIL-MH_Inventory Control-Base Transactions# 4- Consume iLPN having lock code
elements.description:
Creating iLPN through MM3 Create iLPN menu & applythe lock code,validating iLPN have some lock code & consume 
the iLPN using RF Menu. Also validate PIX transaction.

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens RF menu and go to invenorty & perform "RF MM3 Create iLPN" operation
user open iLPN and applies the lock code
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
user opens RF menu and completes "MM3 Consume iLPN" operation in Misc menu
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the iLPN status
validates the PIX Transactions "606" for consuming iLPN
user log out from application

elements.name: Cancel OLPN - Cancel the OLPN at Printed status (SingleLine Sceanrios)

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user update "Single Line DO" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "850" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "110 - Released"
user verifies the item details in Distribuion Order page
user runs the "LTL Pick Wave"
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "130 - DC Allocated"
user open Task screen & verifies task is created for DO in the wave process
fetch the OLPN number
user opens RF menu and completes "MM3 Cancel oLPN" operation in Misc menu
user opens the oLPN details in Distribuion Order page and and verify its status "99 - Cancelled"
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "200 - Cancelled"
validates the PIX message "620 - Order transactions"
user log out from application

elements.name: Cancel OLPN - Cancel the OLPN at Weighed status (SingleLine Sceanrios)

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user update "Single Line DO" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "850" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "110 - Released"
user verifies the item details in Distribuion Order page
user runs the "LTL Pick Wave"
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "130 - DC Allocated"
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "130 - DC Allocated"
user open Task screen & verifies task is created for DO in the wave process
user open RF Menu and complete the pick tasks created
user open RF Menu and complete the pack tasks created
user open Task screen & validates the status of tasks
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "160 - Weighed"
fetch the OLPN number
user opens RF menu and completes "MM3 Cancel oLPN" operation in Misc menu
user opens the oLPN details in Distribuion Order page and and verify its status "99 - Cancelled"
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "200 - Cancelled"
validates the PIX message "620 - Order transactions"
user log out from application

elements.name: Cancel OLPN - Cancel the OLPN at Shipped status (SingleLine Sceanrios)

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user update "Single Line DO" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "850" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "110 - Released"
user verifies the item details in Distribuion Order page
user runs the "LTL Pick Wave"
user views wave and verify the allocation of inventory
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "130 - DC Allocated"
user open Task screen & verifies task is created for DO in the wave process
user open RF Menu and complete the pick tasks created
user open RF Menu and complete the pack tasks created
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "160 - Weighed"
fetch the OLPN number
user opens RF menu and completes Shipping using "MM3 Anchor oLPN" menu
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "165 - Staged"
user navigates to shippment planning workspace
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "190 - Shipped"
fetch the OLPN number
user opens RF menu and completes "MM3 Cancel oLPN" operation in Misc menu
user opens the oLPN details in Distribuion Order page and and verify its status "90 - Shipped"
user opens DO screen and searches for the DistributionOrder and verify its status "190 - Shipped"
validates the PIX message "620 - Order transactions"
user log out from application
